testsuite.name: Automated Scenario Tests / Load - HTTP / HTTP-L-01 - Load profile request for GetDataMeterSum Month

testcase.name: HTTP-L-01 - request completed and returned a response code
HTTP-L-01 - no HTTP 500 server error
HTTP-L-01 - HTTP status is success
HTTP-L-01 - response is a JSON object
HTTP-L-01 - MeterCompare response has chart dictionaries and categories
HTTP-L-01 - response dictionary keys match expected scenario keys
HTTP-L-01 - data arrays align with ArrCategories
HTTP-L-01 - max values are not lower than returned data

testsuite.name: Automated Scenario Tests / Load - HTTP / HTTP-L-03 - Load profile request for GetDataMeterDetail Month

testcase.name: HTTP-L-03 - request completed and returned a response code
HTTP-L-03 - no HTTP 500 server error
HTTP-L-03 - HTTP status is success
HTTP-L-03 - response is a JSON object
HTTP-L-03 - MeterDetail response has chart structure
HTTP-L-03 - each chart series is a bar series with valid data
HTTP-L-03 - stroke chart length matches chart series length
HTTP-L-03 - MeterLabelMap contains selected meter IDs
